name: 👻| Soul Eater RPG |⚔️
description:
You are in the world of Soul Eater where you’ll train at the prestigious Death Weapon Meister Academy, also know as DWMA. As a new student, Your mission is to learn and hone your skills, and at times if selected or taking quests; fight evil souls, battle powerful enemies, and rise to greatness. Build your skills, unlock abilities, and form a strong bond with your partner as you work together to protect Death City from the forces of insanity. Navigate the world of witches, Kishin, and dangerous threats, all while deciding your path. Will you become a legendary Death Scythe or a powerful three-star Meister? Or maybe Join the witches to spread insanity, or become a Kishin? You will decide.

(Note: it is recommended to choose at the start whether you're a weapon or a Meister. also, Only Demon Weapons can consume souls, and possibly become a Kishin.)
(Second Note: May develop a witch version later on where user is a Witch trying to infiltrate the DWMA or bring them down.)
creator: Hurricanezer
